title: SCP: Secret Laboratory

notes: At the time of posting this, the Linux branch of the game is broken, and you have to use Proton with the Steam Version. Use Proton 3.16-8 Beta (or something newer if it works), and when you start the game for the first time, disable full screen. Then close the game, and add this to the launch options: (-force-vulkan -popupwindow). This will force Vulkan, and make the game fullscreen windowed. After this, it is totally smooth sailing. I still don't like getting spooked by Peanut though...
title: SCP: Secret Laboratory

notes: At the time of posting this, the Linux branch of the game is broken, and you have to use Proton with the Windows version. Use Proton 3.16-8 Beta (or something newer if it works), and when you start the game for the first time, disable full screen. Then close the game, and add this to the launch options: (-force-vulkan -popupwindow). This will force Vulkan, and make the game fullscreen windowed. After this, it is totally smooth sailing. The Linux branch will supposedly be fixed in the next game update, though.

notes: The game was tested with proton 4.2-9. The game does not work with the "Linux-For penguin lovers :D" option located in the Betas of the "Properties" option of the game. Apparently the game only works if the headphones and microphone are connected. I wanted to play without them and it doesn't let me connect. The performance goes well with 30fps stable and with a ping of 106 (at least on the server I chose) playing from Mineral de la Reforma state of Hidalgo Mexico. I didn't make any adjustments to proton.
